sections.paragraph:
Original: נחליאל

Transliteration: nachălı̂y'êl

Phonetic: nakh-al-ee-ale'

BDB Definition:

Nahaliel = "torrents of God"
  1. a station of Israel in the wilderness; located north of the Arnon

Origin: from H5158 and H410

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
